summary: All four requirements (REQ-23 through REQ-26) appear to be implemented in the diff. The backend adds the soldOut boolean field, migration.mo handles existing records, the form modal includes the checkbox, the table shows a badge, and the PDF export includes a SOLD OUT marker. One minor concern is that the table shows the badge in a dedicated column rather than in or near the Wine Name column as specified in REQ-25.

missing_requirements.requirement: The 'Sold Out' badge should be placed in or near the Wine Name column.
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary for WineTable.tsx states the badge is shown in 'a dedicated column for sold-out wines' rather than in or near the Wine Name column as specified in REQ-25.

hallucinated_features.description: Sold-out rows are visually dimmed in the table
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions 'slightly dims sold-out rows', which was not requested in any requirement. The requirements only ask for a badge/label on sold-out wines.

hallucinated_features.description: Wine Name is styled with dimmed text in the PDF for sold-out wines
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions 'dimmed wine name styling' in the PDF export for sold-out wines. The requirement only asked for a visually distinct SOLD OUT marker, not dimming the wine name itself.
